query:
SELECT 
  mc.name as categoria,
  mi.name as produto,
  mi.price as preco_centavos,
  mi.price / 100.0 as preco_reais,
  mi.is_available
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN menu_categories mc ON mi.category_id = mc.id
ORDER BY mc.display_order, mi.display_order;
